issues.description: Main ability should use trigger 'Activated' with cost specification. DSL lacks 'cost' field to represent 'rest 2 of your DON!! cards' requirement.
Condition should check if Leader has type {Donquixote Pirates}, not if card is on board. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type 'Donquixote Pirates'.
Action should 'AttachDon' (add DON from deck and rest it), not 'GiveDon'. GiveDon is for generic DON additions without rest specification.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' or 'UntilEndOfBattle' for clarity; 'EndOfBattle' is acceptable but less standard.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Main] You may rest 2 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader has the {Donquixote Pirates} type, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
[Counter] Your Leader gains +3000 power during this battle.
